textNodeIds.note: Prefer setting text via the buttonLabel component property: instances(update, {id, properties: {'buttonLabel#100:50': 'My label'}}). Fall back to direct text node IDs using the formula.

description: Primary action trigger. Use filled+brand for main CTAs, outline+neutral for secondary actions. Default size is small. Set label via the buttonLabel component property.

anatomy.Label: button text (TEXT) — set via buttonLabel component property or direct text node
anatomy.Icon_Left: leading icon (INSTANCE_SWAP), visible when layout includes leading icon
anatomy.Icon_Right: trailing icon (INSTANCE_SWAP), visible when layout includes trailing icon

componentProperties.buttonLabel#100:50: TEXT — the button label text; set via instances(update, {properties: {'buttonLabel#100:50': 'My label'}})
componentProperties.Icon_Left: INSTANCE_SWAP — swap to any DS icon for leading position
componentProperties.Icon_Right: INSTANCE_SWAP — swap to any DS icon for trailing position

whenToUse: Use for interactive actions (submit, cancel, save, proceed). color=brand for default actions; color=critical for destructive actions; color=neutral for de-emphasised actions. type=filled for primary CTAs; type=outline for secondary; type=transparent for tertiary.
notes: color=neutral has no filled variant — only outline and transparent
Default size is small, not medium
icon properties are only visible when the corresponding layout variant is active
